components_analyzed.reason: IBM AIX 7.2 is in its declining support phase. While IBM offers technology refresh updates, AIX 7.2 is aging and not recommended for new deployments.
IBM Db2 version not specified. IBM Db2 LTS versions have long support but the version is indeterminate; assessed as OUTDATED based on legacy context.
FORTRAN 2018 is a valid standard but FORTRAN is a niche legacy language. Modern alternatives exist for most use cases.
